hero.title: Empowering the Next Generation of Healthcare Leaders
hero.subtitle: Pharma4Ghana is a Dutch foundation dedicated to supporting pharmacy and health science students across Ghana with scholarships, mentorship, and resources.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: We believe every talented student deserves access to quality education. Pharma4Ghana bridges the gap between ambition and opportunity for students in pharmaceutical sciences and healthcare across Ghana.

vision.title: Our VisionŒ
vision.body: A future in which every student with talent and motivation has the opportunity to complete training as a pharmacy assistant. Through structured collaboration between professionals in Ghana and the Netherlands, Stichting Pharma4Ghana is building sustainable knowledge transfer and local support. Stichting Pharma4Ghana does not view this international collaboration as temporary aid, but as a partnership founded on equality, respect, and long-term impact.

impact.title: How We Make an Impact
impact.subtitle: Three pillars that define our approach to supporting Ghanaian students.

scholarship.title: Scholarships
scholarship.body: Providing financial support to outstanding pharmacy and health science students at Ghanaian universities, covering tuition, books, and living expenses.

mentorship.title: Mentorship
mentorship.body: Connecting Ghanaian students with experienced pharmacists and healthcare professionals in the Netherlands and Ghana for career guidance.

resources.title: Resources
resources.body: Donating textbooks, laboratory equipment, and digital learning tools to pharmacy faculties across Ghana.

cta.title: Make a Difference Today
cta.body: Your contribution enables the next generation of pharmacists and healthcare workers in Ghana to reach their full potential.

hero.title: About Pharma4Ghana
hero.subtitle: A foundation built on the belief that education is the most powerful tool for transforming lives.

story.title: Our Story
story.para1: Stichting Pharma4Ghana was founded in 2026 by four Dutch pharmacists. Our shared passion for pharmacy and our drive to contribute to education in Ghana brought us together. What began as a modest initiative to provide financial support to a handful of students has grown into a foundation that makes a fundamental contribution to educational opportunities for the pharmaceutical care professionals of the future.
story.para2: We work together with the Health Access Institute in Accra, an educational institution that trains pharmacy assistants. Together, we strengthen this education.

education.title: Practice-Oriented Education
education.body: Education that aligns with practical experience. For example, case-based lessons and project-based learning, complementing theoretical knowledge. We strive to ensure that students are optimally prepared for their roles in healthcare.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.body: Focus on long-term impact. We work closely with local educational and healthcare institutions to ensure that we create sustainable and meaningful changes.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.body: Education for every student. We believe that every motivated student should have the same opportunities. As graduated healthcare professionals, they contribute to their communities and the healthcare system in Ghana.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.body: Collaborating based on respect and trust. We prioritize local values and work together to achieve common goals.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Dedicated pharmacists from the Netherlands, united by a passion for education.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: Have questions or want to get involved? We would love to hear from you.

hero.title: Support a Student in Ghana
hero.subtitle: Every donation helps fund scholarships, learning materials, and mentorship for future pharmacists and healthcare professionals.

scholarships.title: Scholarships
scholarships.body: Helps cover tuition costs for talented pharmacy and health science students in Ghana.

materials.title: Study materials
materials.body: Funds textbooks, lab tools, and digital learning resources that students can actually use.

mentorship.title: Mentorship
mentorship.body: Supports practical guidance from pharmacists and healthcare professionals in Ghana and the Netherlands.

successPage.title: Thank you for your contribution
successPage.subtitle: Your donation helps Pharma4Ghana invest directly in the next generation of pharmacists and healthcare professionals in Ghana.
successPage.messageBody: We use contributions like yours to support scholarships, practical study materials, and mentorship that helps students complete their education with confidence.
successPage.impactTitle: Your donation helps make this possible
successPage.receiptUnavailable: Receipt is temporarily unavailable. Please contact us and include your payment confirmation.

trust.title: Why Stripe in Next.js
trust.body: Stripe is the cleaner choice here: strong TypeScript support, a simple server-side Checkout flow, and a well-tested integration model for Next.js route handlers.
trust.methods: If you later want a more Netherlands-first payment stack, Mollie is still a valid option. For this app, Stripe is the faster and lower-risk integration.

meta.title: Messages
meta.description: Read the latest Pharma4Ghana messages, reflections, and field updates in reverse chronological order.

hero.title: Messages & Updates
hero.subtitle: Short reflections from our work, our partners, and the students we support in Ghana.

messagesPage.intro: This page collects our latest messages in one place. We publish short updates whenever there is something concrete to share from the classroom, the partnership, or the students we support.

donateBanner.title: Help turn these updates into lasting progress
donateBanner.body: Every donation helps us support students with scholarships, study materials, and practical mentoring that stays close to their education.

footer.tagline: Empowering the next generation of pharmacists and healthcare professionals in Ghana.
